description:
Create a PERT chart for a 'System Migration Project' titled 'ERP System Migration - PERT Chart'. The chart must include the following activities, with the Expected Time (Te) calculated for each using the formula (O + 4M + P) / 6 rounded to 1 decimal:

- A: Requirements Gathering (O:2, M:3, P:5)
- B: System Analysis (O:3, M:4, P:6)
- C: Hardware Procurement (O:4, M:6, P:10)
- D: Database Design (O:2, M:3, P:4)
- E: Application Development (O:6, M:8, P:12)
- F: Test Environment Setup (O:1, M:2, P:3)
- G: Data Migration (O:2, M:4, P:6)
- H: Integration Testing (O:3, M:4, P:6)
- I: User Acceptance Testing (O:2, M:3, P:4)
- J: Go-Live Deployment (O:1, M:1, P:2)

Dependencies: A -> {B, C}; B -> {D, E}; D -> {E, G}; C -> F; F -> G; {E, G} -> H; H -> I; I -> J. 

Save the editable file to /home/ga/Diagrams/pert_migration.eddx and export the image to /home/ga/Diagrams/pert_migration.png.
